TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-angry_pilaw_abas

S.FORM: pakunku pa iku tu zana masang.
S.TRANSL: I will tell a story that happened in the past.

S.FORM: e zau teRaqanna aitanan mai tu kelisiw saizi nani.
S.TRANSL: 為了我們沒有錢的事情這樣。

S.FORM: uany nani Rahitay ya tiaRay ‘nay nani.
tu pameng yau ya pakelawkawayan pasangian tu tianhua nani.
S.TRANSL: 突然有做電話的工人來。
Suddenly, there came workers who worked on telecommunication.

S.FORM: o ho tingaday qaya tienhua tienhua saizi smanu tamaikuan tu tu zau mai isu qumuni kiwku.
S.TRANSL: 哦 (有一天) Ngaday 告訴我說, “Kiwku, 你現在也沒在做什麼事”。
Oh, Ngaday told me that, ‘You, Kiwku, don’t have any work to do.’

S.FORM: mai iku tu qakelawkewayan.
S.TRANSL: I have no work to do.

S.FORM: ‘nay pasangian tu tianhua zinna ni ngaday tu.
S.TRANSL: There were workers who did telecommunication.

S.FORM: kasianem ti iku spaR ita qibasi tu qudusna zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我心想我為何要洗別人的衣服。
I wonder why I should wash their clothes.

S.FORM: qu ahyangku nani quni qibasi si mana.
S.TRANSL: 我哥哥(說), ‘也可以洗衣服啊!’

S.FORM: azu mai qabulaan tu kelisiw zinna iku ‘nay tu.
S.TRANSL: 他對我說, ‘好像他們不給錢似的,(又不是沒給錢)’。
He said to me, ‘It seems like they wouldn’t give you money.’

S.FORM: a kwa ya zinku tu.
S.TRANSL: 我就說好, 我就答應了。

S.FORM: yau ti tingaday tumungaw tamaikuan tu qudus a yau tu.
S.TRANSL: Ngaday came and gave me the clothes.

S.FORM: qibasianku ti.
buying iku zinna ni ngaday ‘nay mailiw qaniyau kelawkaway masang nani.
S.TRANSL: Ngaday說: 我沒空. 他們輪流工作。
‘I’m busy,’ said Ngaday. They took turns working.

S.FORM: tu a kwa ya wiya ti iku ya qibasi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我就去啦, 開始洗衣服啦。
I started to wash the clothes.

S.FORM: maiseng ti ya niqibasian a yau.
S.TRANSL: The clothes that I washed were dried.

S.FORM: tepikanku ti tu.
yau ti ya pasa izaan ay pakelawkawayan ‘nay tu tienhua nani.
o o.
a zau maiseng ti ya niqibasian tu qudusniq zinna.
S.TRANSL: 這個我們洗的衣服乾了嗎?

S.FORM: zinna ni aRay saiza ipilan ni aRay nani.
tu a maiseng ti yu zinku antangi qawtuanniq mala zinna pakelawkawayan nayau tu.
S.TRANSL: “哦, 乾了”, 我說. “我們等一下來拿”, 他們說。
“Oh, they were already dry,” I said. “We will come later to take (our clothes)’, said the workers.

S.FORM: qametanna ti ni a anem ya aRay wa.
mai talepawan.
pisapat a napawanta nayau.
nayau m mai imi tmanan ya.
en ya mana ada ngidanan ti zinna saiza ni aRay tu wiya ti RaRiwan ti iku ya tu.
S.TRANSL: ‘I want to go to...,’ thought ARay.

S.FORM: matiw ti tatenganan tizingayan nani.
S.TRANSL: (He) went to our aunt, Zingay’s place.

S.FORM: qan pa ita ti saRabiika.
qeRasika ya tamasu.
S.TRANSL: Call your father (to come home for dinner).

S.FORM: zau zinan wiya ti ya tizinan.
taqa yu abu yau tayan qman zinna.
S.TRANSL: Zinan 說, ‘(他)不要, 阿母, (爸爸他)在那邊吃了’。
Zinan said, ‘Mom, (Father) did not want to (come home); (he) had dinner there.’

S.FORM: a azu qman tu Raq zin ni zinan.
kidadanna sayza qman tu Raq zinku.
S.TRANSL: It doesn’t matter that he drank.

S.FORM: azkaw sebi ti ya sunis a zau.
kunanku paqananna sunisku kintulu.
S.TRANSL: I fed the three children first.

S.FORM: nani mana nengi ti tazian qaliwan qanan.
S.TRANSL: It doesn’t matter that he had meals there.

S.FORM: zinku mai tu tangi nani yau ti aw mai iku tapawan simunang isu zinna.
S.TRANSL: 我不在,你跟人家約會, 他這麼說。
‘When I was not at home, you had affairs,’ said he.

S.FORM: wa simunang azu iku qumuni zinku.
oh niana qibasiansu o nayau a tazungan.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼要洗人家的衣服,女孩子就是那樣。
Why did you wash others’ clothes? Girls are like that.

S.FORM: a pisapat kmilim tu zau zinna.
S.TRANSL: ‘你隨便找(麻煩)’ 他這樣說。
‘You were asking for trouble,’ said he.

S.FORM: nayau isu mai iku tapawan zinna.
S.TRANSL: ‘我不在的時候,你就是這樣’, 他這樣說。
‘When I wasn’t at home, you were like that,’ said he.

S.FORM: akaw sayza qibasi iku nani namani yau ni lazat a yau talepawanta.
S.TRANSL: 我洗衣服的時候,那個人有在我們家嗎?
While I was washing the clothes, was that person at our home?

S.FORM: wiya ti taqatian qaniyau si.
pasangian smangi tu lintu yu ipilika ya tingaday zinku.
S.TRANSL: ‘他們是做電的,你去問Ngaday’ 我這樣說。
‘They are workers of telecommunication. You could ask Ngaday,’ said I.

S.FORM: mai ya tingaday pawRatanna iku nani anu nayau mai iku qibasi.
S.TRANSL: 要不是ngaday要我做,我也不會洗衣服。
If Ngaday hadn’t asked me to do it, I wouldn’t have washed their clothes.

S.FORM: qu tikingciang qibasiika ya qawman bulaan tu kelisiw zin ni kingciang.
S.TRANSL: Kingciang說就洗衣服啊,(他們)一定會給錢。
Kingciang said, ‘Wash the clothes. (They) will definitely give you money.’

S.FORM: teRaqanku qibasi.
S.TRANSL: So I agreed to wash their clothes.

S.FORM: unay nani.
mai bunay anemna.
bunay pa ni.
bibidasanna iku.
nazau ay tazungan sapaqunian zinna.
S.TRANSL: ‘我不要這樣的女孩子’, 他這樣說。
‘(I) don’t want this kind of wife,’ said he.

S.FORM: sapaqunian.
mai nianemanku isu si zin na anemku tabuanku.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡你. 我放在心裡沒講出來。
I don’t love you (anymore). I kept it in my heart. (I wrapped it in my heart.)

S.FORM: msukaw ngibiRna.
aka nani yu.
atu nayau ya tu o o tama tipiwi qayau miza yu bangbang tata o nayau zi kwa tazungan.
S.TRANSL: Piwi added fuel to the fire.

S.FORM: zinna padames ti ya.
yau ti ya ti tenganku pa tiaRay s snayau pisapat mqila tu tenganku zinna.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼隨便罵我的弟妹?
Why did you scold my sister-in-law?

S.FORM: mqila.
nayau imu.
patatapunanna ti ya tenganku ticingay mqila.
S.TRANSL: He scolded my sister-in-law as well.

S.FORM: tangi a tepusanna ti ni shuyzun saiza mipil nibibidasna tamaikuan.
S.TRANSL: Shuyzun couldn’t listen to him curse me anymore.

S.FORM: yau ti yu.
aRay ya zin ni shuyzun pisapat isu mqila ta napawansu.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼隨便罵你的老婆?
Why did you scold your wife?

S.FORM: yau iku wobaozhengna tmayta tu napawansu.
S.TRANSL: 我保證(她沒有做壞事,因為)我每天看你老婆。
I ensure that (your wife didn’t misbehave because) I saw her every day.

S.FORM: zinna ni shuyzun qumuni isu snayau.
saqaqabian ni kelawkawy napawansu.
mai yu azu ‘laq napawansu zinna ti ni shuyzun.
S.TRANSL: ‘你的老婆不像別人’ Shuyzun這樣說。
‘Your wife is not like others,’ said Shuyzun.

S.FORM: anu naquni zinsu haw yau aiku baozhenganna aisu tu zau.
naquni napawansu zinna ti ni shuyzun.
kawka mlimet ma.
Rabi ‘nay nani kmilim ti iku tu kyataya.
qangi pa ita mpatay.
yau ita sakulusayan kelawkelaway pilay ita nani.
S.TRANSL: 我每天走來走去工作,很累。
I walked to and fro while working. I feel tired.

S.FORM: nazau wanay pama.
S.TRANSL: He is still mean to me.

S.FORM: naquni kawka nengi mai tu kelisiw na.
S.TRANSL: 怎樣才能有錢? 沒有錢吶。
What should we do? We do not have money.

S.FORM: anu yau kelisiw haw mai iku qibasi.
S.TRANSL: 有錢的話我不會去洗衣服。
If we had had money, I wouldn’t have washed the clothes.

S.FORM: mai tizit a zau lanasta.
S.TRANSL: This thing would not have happened.

S.FORM: zinna pizianku taanemanku tmabu nani.
kmilim iku tu iyu kya nani.
qa qa patay pa ita.
patay ita Raynguanta nianianu.
S.TRANSL: 死了就什麼是也不知道了。
If I die, I won’t know anything.

S.FORM: azu ti aisu saiza aiku nayau.
kilimanku ti ya.
yau ngatuta qaynay munebi.
S.TRANSL: 上次剩下的藥. (我)收起來。

S.FORM: mihunsya tu tazuq qawman yau pama.
S.TRANSL: There must be some remaining pesticides.

S.FORM: kilimanku mai kmkala.
S.TRANSL: I kept looking for it. I didn’t find it.

S.FORM: sinpiansu tu mai qizi tayan.
en si yu nani.
mai azu teRi ti kya.
S.TRANSL: I didn’t find it. It was already dawn.

S.FORM: en tabRabi nani taytaanku mai ti yu tiaRay.
wiya ti qipaRin matiw.
tmayta tu nikelawkawayanku tawian tabawbian.
paluma iku tu qawbiq.
mudu ita tu babuy masang nani.
yau ti.
mutung tu taquq palanaanniq ti ya.
sunisku mai pama qman sa taRabi nani.
S.TRANSL: My child hadn’t had breakfast yet.

S.FORM: mai ti ama unay.
qaqanqan pa ita mai ti.
akwa qan pa ita.
mai pama qman sunis a zau.
lingianku qaya.
nani tu taqsi taqa imu sunis a zau muna qman.
S.TRANSL: The child had to eat first.

S.FORM: saluna pa ti sunis qangid taqsi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子要去上學怎麼辦?
The child had to go to school.

S.FORM: mlana imi kyami zinku qman ti imi sataRabi tu.
S.TRANSL: 我們等不到, 我們先吃。

S.FORM: nayau ya qmnut iku tu ngid qan tu iyu.
S.TRANSL: 我很生氣,想要吃藥(自殺)。
I was so angry that I wanted to take medicine (to commit suicide).

S.FORM: nayau nayau qmnut ita ngid ita qan tu iyu saizi.
S.TRANSL: 我們很生氣,想要吃藥(自殺)。
We were angry and wanted to take medicine (to commit suicide).
